articles.title: Data analytics firm Arkham Intelligence adding support for Polygon in Q1
articles.description: Arkham Intelligence plans to add support for more chains in the future and will be airdropping its token to people who participate in its private beta.

articles.title: CNBC’s Jim Cramer Warns Investors To Stay Away From Crypto, Says Bitcoin Not a Hedge ‘Against Anything’
articles.description: CNBC host Jim Cramer is once again warning investors to stay away from crypto assets and Bitcoin (BTC), instead saying they should opt for gold. In a new update, the host of Mad Money says that the top digital asset by market cap’s latest price bounce hasn’t convinced him of its legitimacy. “Now that Bitcoin […]

articles.title: Banking Giant Goldman Sachs Ranks Bitcoin As World Best Performing Asset
articles.description: Ahead of Gold, US Treasury, the S&P 500, and others, banking giant Goldman Sachs ranks Bitcoin (BTC) in the top 1 best-performing asset year-to-date, per a Twitter user. Related Reading: MakerDAO Passes Proposal To Deploy $100 Million USDC In Yearn Finance Vault According to Goldman Sachs, Bitcoin has outperformed its cryptocurrency pairs and those major financial institutions of the traditional market with a risk-adjusted return (Sharpe ratio) of 3.1. The Sharpe Ratio is used to measure market

articles.title: $1 ADA Price Beckons As Cardano’s Djed Stablecoin Is Finally Scheduled For Launch Next Week
articles.description: The much-anticipated Djed stablecoin is scheduled for launch next week, fostering expansion and novel applications in the rapidly developing decentralized finance (DeFi) sector of the Cardano ecosystem.

articles.title: Judge denies motions from Celsius users seeking to reclaim assets
articles.description: Two claimants called out former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky in motions, claiming he misled users, while all suggested that the platform’s terms of use left assets in their control.

articles.title: Marinade Finance announces rewards to boost liquid staking on Solana
articles.description: Marinade Finance will reward users with a total of 160 million marinade tokens for depositing SOL over the next 12 months.

articles.title: MakerDAO community backs plan to deposit $100 million into Yearn Finance
articles.description: MakerDAO community has supported a decision to deposit $100 million of USDC stablecoin into a Yearn Finance vault.
